title: Forest Plus Performance
description: This Modpack takes a aggressive approach towards performance, can more than TRIPLE your FPS in most situations and also includes many basic QOL improvements, especially from Optifine!
body:
A Modpack focused on optimization and increasing fps for low-end pcs!

A combination of the following mods along with a pre-optimized config will provide almost TRIPLED FPS, includes a couple basic QOL Improvements as well, especially from Optifine!

**WARNING** - FPS is limited to 100 by default to prevent throttling!

This Modpack includes:

LazyDFU - https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu

Sodium - https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium

Phosphor - https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor

Lithium - https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium

Sodium Extra - https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra

Reese's Sodium Options - https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options

Entity Culling - https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling

FerriteCore - https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core

LambDynamicLights - https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights

Memory Leak Fix - https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix

C2ME - https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric

Cloth Config API - https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config

Enhanced Block Entities - https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe

Exordium - https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium

Immediately Fast - https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast

Indium - https://modrinth.com/mod/indium

Krypton - https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton

ModernFix - https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix

More Culling - https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling

No Chat Reports - https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports

Dynamic FPS - https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps

Methane - https://modrinth.com/mod/methane

Iris Shaders - https://modrinth.com/mod/iris

Clean F3 - https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3

Mod Menu - https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu

Zoomify - https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify
